title: poa poiformis
intro: Poa poiformis, also known as blue grass or blue grass orchid grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever and soothing respiratory issues. Poa poiformis is often prepared as an infusion or a decoction to be consumed as a tea, and its herbal preparations are also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
